protein_name: Regulates maturation and trafficking of the transmembrane metalloprotease ADAM10. Negatively regulates ADAM10-mediated cleavage of GP6. Promotes ADAM10-mediated cleavage of CDH5. Belongs to the tetraspanin (TM4SF) family. 3 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Biological Process: positive regulation of Notch signaling pathway; protein localization to plasma membrane; protein maturation
